## Highlights

`feishu-md-sync@0.3.0` makes the CLI safe and predictable for Agent-driven Markdown synchronization while preserving the existing human CLI workflow.

- Check compatibility through `feishu-md-sync --version` before an Agent operates the CLI.
- Consume typed JSON failures with stable categories, subtypes, exit codes, retryability, hints, missing scopes, and required confirmation flags.
- Use one version-matched `$feishu-md-sync` Agent Skill for status, diff, publish, create, pull, merge, and explicit Whiteboard synchronization.
- Keep authentication and Feishu IO with the official `lark-cli`, routing authentication and permission repair through `$lark-shared`.
- Preserve dry-run-first behavior: untracked remote adoption, collaboration risk, Whiteboard overwrite, and document replacement still require explicit approval.
- Validate the complete Agent-facing CLI contract, local Skill installation, and CLI/Skill compatibility during CI and tagged releases.

## Installation

Install the npm CLI and Agent Skill from the same release:

```bash
npm install --global feishu-md-sync@0.3.0
npx skills add 'liyun95/feishu-md-sync#v0.3.0' --skill feishu-md-sync --global --yes
```

Verify the CLI and official Lark authentication:

```bash
feishu-md-sync --version
lark-cli auth status --json --verify
```

The Agent Skill requires `feishu-md-sync >=0.3.0 <0.4.0`. Upgrade or reinstall both components from the same tag when moving to another release line.

## Agent usage

Invoke the Skill explicitly while adopting it:

```text
Use $feishu-md-sync to synchronize ./doc.md with this Feishu document. Review the dry-run first and do not bypass any safety gate.
```

The Skill drives the installed CLI; it does not replace it. Use `$lark-doc` for ad hoc remote-only edits and `$lark-shared` for login, identity, scope, application configuration, and permission repair.

## Included pull requests

- [#42](https://github.com/liyun95/feishu-md-sync/pull/42) — Agent-ready CLI version and structured error contract.
- [#43](https://github.com/liyun95/feishu-md-sync/pull/43) — Version-matched Agent Skill, distribution validation, and Agent workflow documentation.

See the [Agent usage guide](https://liyun95.github.io/feishu-md-sync/guide/agent-usage) and [command reference](https://liyun95.github.io/feishu-md-sync/reference/commands) for the complete workflow and machine contract.
